```json
{
  "action": "sql",
  "sql": "SELECT
  s.cntry_cd AS country,
  s.state_cd AS state,
  s.city_nm AS city,
  SUM(oh.tot_amt) AS total_revenue
FROM ord_hdr oh
JOIN store_dim s ON oh.store_id = s.store_id
WHERE oh.sts_cd <> 'X'
GROUP BY s.cntry_cd, s.state_cd, s.city_nm
ORDER BY s.cntry_cd, s.state_cd, s.city_nm",
  "reason": null
}
```
